title: Improve ps handling of container start/stop time
body:
Previously all calculations were done based off the container's start time. Retrieve end time and use it to calculate time stopped for containers.

Also, convert ps JSON output to report timestamps for create, start, and stop times.

Fixes: #1223

comments.body: LGTM ... i would prefer to handle the varlink stuff here but a second PR is OK as long as it comes quick and we don't remain unsync'd for long.
